description: Curated Klang Valley events for the demo window. Each event has a zone (from zones_kl.json) and expected crowd size. This is the seeded event source when no live API is connected. Events within the next 14 days are surfaced to the GLM.

events.name: International artist concert
events.notes: ~15k attendees; dispersal peak ~23:00 - 23:45. High surge window expected post-event in adjacent zones.

events.name: Malaysia vs. Thailand football friendly
events.notes: ~40k attendees; LRT + car exit surge. Major post-match demand in Bangsar / Mid Valley / KLCC.

events.name: Malaysia Tech Expo 2026
events.notes: 3-day expo; lunch + end-of-day surge from Bandar Sunway to PJ/Subang.

events.name: Ramadan bazaar (select locations)
events.notes: Pre-buka-puasa traffic; short high-demand window 17:00-19:00 near bazaar zones.

events.name: KLIA international arrivals peak (school holiday return)
events.notes: Post-holiday return wave; 20+ flight arrivals within 4-hour window; premium airport-run fares but long deadhead risk on return.
